machinesManager.title: Machines Manager
machinesManager.subtitle: Web application for machines management
machinesManager.description: This web application provides many functionalities that aims to improve the processes of managing machines and scheduling. Application allows to add, delete and modify machines, set statuses and monitor them thanks to implemented table. Moreover registered user can use based on statuses calcualted statistics
